---
title: "Mastermind Trivia"
format: 
  revealjs:
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    theme: solarized
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false

# Load libraries ----
library(tidyverse)
```

# About this quiz

These questions will start easy and get harder--so watch out! Everyone will play against the mastermind on their given topic.

## About the questions {.smaller}

Below are the types of questions you'll see:

1. Multiple-choice
    - The easiest question to get yourself situated
2. Open 
    - It gets a little harder when you don't have options anymore
3. Ranking
    - Can you put them in the right order?

--- 

## About the questions, cont'd {.smaller}

4. Sound-bite
    - I'll play a sound clip and you'll have to answer the question related to it
5. Range
    - Unlike the other questions so far, whoever is closest will get this point
6. Who/What am I?
    - You'll get 3 clues, if you can get the person/object on the first clue that'll be worth 3 points, 2 for the second clue, and 1 for the last clue--pending you get the right answer

## About the scoring

We'll calculate the differentials between the mastermind and the rest of the team--whoever has the highest differential wins.

# Bhagy: Brooklyn 99

## Question 1

What is Terry's wife's name?

a. Linda
b. Susan
c. Sharon
d. Erin

## Question 2

What mobile game does Holt become addicted to?

## Question 3

Order these minor characters by number of episode appearances (highest to lowest)

a. Cheddar
b. Caleb John Gosche
c. Madeline Wuntch
d. Bill Hummertrout
e. Adrian Pimento

## Question 4

What is Rosa doing to Charles in this [soundbite](https://youtu.be/Xu-VaMy9sFQ?si=95CPKOY63Rn5O7A9&t=914)?

## Question 5

In Season 1 Jake Peralta discovers he owes back rent on his grandmother's appartment after failing to open the mail. How much does he owe?


## Question 6

Who am I?

::: {.incremental}
- I am an inanimate object that Charles Boyle aggressively tracks down because I am allegedly "haunted" by the spirit of a 1920s mobster's mistress.
- Charles leaves me to Jake and Amy in his will.
- I require a highly specific, disgusting daily feeding ritual and I am the secret behind the Boyle family's legendary pizza crust.
:::

## Question 1

What is Terry's wife's name?

a. Linda
b. Susan
c. **Sharon**
d. Erin

## Question 2

What mobile game does Holt become addicted to?

**Kwazy Cupcakes**

## Question 3

Order these minor characters by number of episode appearances (highest to lowest)

e. Adrian Pimento (13)
c. Madeline Wuntch (12)
a. Cheddar (9)
d. Bill Hummertrout (7)
b. Caleb John Gosche (4)


## Question 4

What is Rosa doing to Charles in this [soundbite](https://youtu.be/Xu-VaMy9sFQ?si=95CPKOY63Rn5O7A9&t=914)?

**Shooting him with a Portable Ultrasonic Weapon.**

## Question 5

In Season 1 Jake Peralta discovers he owes back rent on his grandmother's appartment after failing to open the mail. How much does he owe?

**$43,000**

## Question 6

Who am I?

- I am an inanimate object that Charles Boyle aggressively tracks down because I am allegedly "haunted" by the spirit of a 1920s mobster's mistress.
- Charles leaves me to Jake and Amy in his will.
- I require a highly specific, disgusting daily feeding ritual and I am the secret behind the Boyle family's legendary pizza crust.


**The Motherdough**

# Noah: Metal Music

## Question 1

Which of the following well-known 1960s bands is not considered a pioneer of heavy metal?

a. Led Zeppelin
b. The Rolling Stones
c. Deep Purple
d. Black Sabbath

## Question 2

This northern European city was considered an early metal music hub

## Question 3

Order the "mainstream" appearance of each metal subgenre from earliest to latest:

a. Doom Metal
b. Alternative Metal
c. Thrash Metal
d. Death Metal
e. Grunge Metal


## Question 4

Which metal-inspired artist is featured in this clip?

## Question 5

BABYMETAL are a Nu Metal Group from Japan. As of July 13th. How many plays does their top song have on Spotify?


## Question 6

What am I?

::: {.incremental}
- This style evolved out of progressive metal.
- This style heavily uses syncopated riffs, distortions and polyrhythms.
- This style characteristically uses 7, 8 or even 9 stringed-guitars.
:::


## Answers

## Question 1

Which of the following well-known 1960s bands is not considered a pioneer of heavy metal?

a. Led Zeppelin
b. **The Rolling Stones**
c. Deep Purple
d. Black Sabbath

## Question 2

This northern European city was considered an early metal music hub

**Gothenburg, Sweden**

## Question 3

Order the "mainstream" appearance of each submetal genre from earliest to latest:

a. Thrash Metal (1980s)
b. Death Metal (mid 1980s)
c. Doom Metal (late 1980s - early 90s)
d. Grunge Metal (mid 1990s)
e. Alternative Metal (early 2000s)

## Question 4

Which metal-inspired artist is featured in this clip?

**Evanescence**

## Question 5

BABYMETAL are a Nu Metal Group from Japan. As of July 13th. How many plays does their top song have on Spotify?

143,910,465

## Question 6

What am I? 

- This style evolved out of progressive metal.
- This style heavily uses syncopated riffs, distortions and polyrhythms.
- This style characteristically uses 7, 8 or even 9 stringed-guitars.

**Djent**


# Hayley: Grade 9 Geography

## Question 1

Which province produces the most hydroelectric power?

a. Ontario
b. Quebec
c. British Columbia
d. Alberta

## Question 2

Which natural resource industry employs the most people in Canada?

## Question 3

Order these Canadian demographic events:

a. Canada's population surpasses 30 million
b. Millenials outnumbered Baby Boomers
c. Canada's total fertility rate drops below 2 babies per female
d. The first Gen Alpha is born
e. Nunavut becomes a territory

## Question 4

What location is "discovered" in this [Heritage Minute](https://www.historicacanada.ca/productions/minutes/jean-nicollet)?

## Question 5

How many square km is the Canadian shield?

## Question 6

What am I?

::: {.incremental}
- I am named after a Greek explorer.
- I caused a major earthquake in 1700.
- I am a microplate in the ring of fire.
:::

## Answers

## Question 1

Which province produces the most hydroelectric power?

a. Ontario
b. **Quebec**
c. British Columbia
d. Alberta

## Question 2

Which natural resource industry employs the most people in Canada?

**Minerals and metals**

## Question 3

Order these Canadian demographic events:

a. Canada's total fertility rate drops below 2 babies per female (1972)
b. Nunavut becomes a territory (1999)
c. Canada's population surpasses 30 million (2001)
d. The first Gen Alpha is born (2010)
e. Millenials outnumbered Baby Boomers (2023)

## Question 4

What location is "discovered" in this [Heritage Minute](https://www.historicacanada.ca/productions/minutes/jean-nicollet)?

**Lake Michigan**

## Question 5

How many square km is the Canadian shield?

**8,000,000 km^2**

## Question 6

What am I? 

- I am named after a Greek explorer.
- I caused a major earthquake in 1700.
- I am a microplate in the ring of fire.

**Juan de Fuca Plate**


# Thanks for playing!
